meals.name: Sheet Pan Lemon Herb Salmon & Veggies
meals.label: Meal A
ings: 1 tsp salt, ¾ tsp black pepper
steps: Preheat oven to 425°F. Line a large rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper.
Toss broccoli, cherry tomatoes, and zucchini with olive oil and ½ tsp salt. Spread in a single layer. Roast 12 minutes.
Whisk together olive oil, 2 tbsp lemon juice, garlic powder, dill, salt, and pepper.
Push veggies to sides. Nestle salmon in center. Brush with herb mixture. Squeeze remaining lemon over top.
Bake 12–15 minutes until salmon flakes easily. Internal temp 145°F.
meals.note: 💡 The tomatoes get jammy and sweet at high heat — kids love them.

meals.name: Chicken Tikka Masala + Cauliflower
meals.label: Meal B
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt, lemon, spices overnight.
Sear chicken, build sauce, simmer with cream.
meals.note: 🧠 1½ cups cream + 2 cans tomato sauce for proper consistency.

meals.name: Pesto Chicken Tortellini & Veggies
meals.label: Meal C
steps: Cook chicken with sun-dried tomatoes, remove.
Combine chicken with pesto, add tortellini and cherry tomatoes.
